content.cn_text: 你将听到中央城市大学招生官黛安·凯利对一群新来的国际学生讲话。
content.en_text: You will hear Diane Kelly, the Admissions Officer at Central City University talking to a group of newly arrived international students.

content.cn_text: 听第一部分录音时，请回答问题11至问题16。
content.en_text: As you listen to the first part of the talk answer Questions 11 to 16.

content.cn_text: 在听录音之前，请看问题11至问题16。
content.en_text: Before you listen, look at Questions 11 to 16.

content.cn_text: (短暂的停顿)
content.en_text: [SHORT PAUSE]

content.cn_text: 黛安·凯莉:
content.en_text: DIANE KELLY:

content.cn_text: 对于那些我还没见过面的人，我的名字是Diane Kelly，中央大学的国际招生官。
content.en_text: For those of you I haven't met, my name is Diane Kelly, the International Admissions Officer at Central University.

content.cn_text: 今天，我在这里解释一些学生支持服务，你可能会在你的课程中使用。
content.en_text: Today, I'm here to explain some of the student support services which you might like to access during your courses.

content.cn_text: 首先我想说清楚的是，你们都有资格得到这种帮助——你们所需要做的就是请求帮助。
content.en_text: The first thing I'd like to make clear is that you are all entitled to this help - all you need to do is ask for it.

content.cn_text: 你可以完全使用这里所有的常规大学设施和专门为国际学生设立的额外服务。
content.en_text: You have full access to all of the regular university facilities here and additional services set up exclusively for international students.

content.cn_text: 这些服务分为四个主要责任领域:学术支持、图书馆员服务、行政服务和学生会提供的服务。
content.en_text: These services are grouped under four main areas of responsibility - academic support,librarian services, administrative services and those provided by the student union.

content.cn_text: 学术支持服务的工作人员有资格帮助您选择课程，内容描述和个别科目评估标准的解释。
content.en_text: The staff in Academic Support Services is qualified to assist you in course selection,content description and explanation of assessment criteria for individual subjects.

content.cn_text: 我们也有一位国际学生顾问，他会帮助来自非英语背景的学生。
content.en_text: We also have an International Student Advisor who is there to help students from non-English-speaking backgrounds.

content.cn_text: 你们所有人都达到了进入特定课程的英语要求，但在某些阶段，你可能需要语言支持。国际学生顾问就是为了这个目的。
content.en_text: All of you have achieved the English requirements for entry to your particular courses but it is possible at some stage, that you will need language support.The International Student Advisor is there for that purpose.

content.cn_text: 不过要注意，他在学期末非常忙，他不会帮你写作业的!
content.en_text: Be warned though - he is very busy at the end of semesters and he won't write your assignments for you!

content.cn_text: 如果你需要一般学习技巧方面的帮助，国际学生顾问可能会把你带到我们的图书馆服务人员那里。
content.en_text: If you need assistance with general study skills, the International Student Advisor will probably direct you to our library services staff.

content.cn_text: 图书馆服务部由三个部门组成:研究及资源部;学习技巧和学生信息技术部。
content.en_text: Library Services is made up of three departments - Research and Resource; Study Skills and the Student IT Department.

content.cn_text: 学习技巧部非常积极地推动小型学习和学习小组。
content.en_text: The Study Skills Department is very active in promoting small learning and study groups.

content.cn_text: 他们会很乐意帮助你加入其中一个小组，将你的需求与其他学生相匹配。
content.en_text: They will gladly help you to join one of these groups by matching your needs with other students.

content.cn_text: 在你拿到学生证后，学生信息技术部将为你安排学校电脑的电子邮件访问和密码。
content.en_text: After you get your student cards, the Student IT Department will arrange your email access and passwords for the university computers.

content.cn_text: 你首先需要有学生证，所以不要没有学生证就去那里。
content.en_text: You do need to have your student card first, so don't go there without it.

content.cn_text: 学生卡由行政学生服务区的行政人员签发。
content.en_text: Student cards are issued by Administration Officers in the Administration Student Services area.

content.cn_text: 你们中的许多人目前住在寄宿家庭，但如果你想搬进更独立的住宿，请见行政大楼的住房官员。
content.en_text: A lot of you are in homestay at present, but if you want to move into more independent-style accommodation, see the Housing Officer at the Administration Building.

content.cn_text: 不过也别太乐观了——靠近大学又好又便宜的住处需求量很大!
content.en_text: Don't be too optimistic though - good, cheap accommodation close to the university is in high demand!

content.cn_text: 这是可以找到的，但我们建议你早点去见住宿官!
content.en_text: It can be found but we advise you to see the Accommodation Officer early!

content.cn_text: 我们也有学生就业官，当然，还有民宿官，你可能已经见过他了。
content.en_text: We also have a Student Employment Officer and of course, the Homestay Officer, whom you would have met already.

content.cn_text: 大学书店，最重要的是，我们的国际部在行政大楼，所以如果你有任何关于你的护照或签证的问题，一定要来找我们。
content.en_text: The University Bookshop and most importantly, our International Department is in the Administration Building — so make sure that you come and see us if you have any questions about your passports or visas.

content.cn_text: 学生会也很活跃，提供了一些很好的服务。
content.en_text: The Student Union is also very active and provides some great services.

content.cn_text: 例如，如果你在这里有任何个人或经济问题，学生会提供学生咨询服务。
content.en_text: For example, if you have any personal or financial problems while you're here, the student union offers a Student Counselling Service.

content.cn_text: 你需要预约咨询师。
content.en_text: You will need to make appointments to see a counsellor.

content.cn_text: 如果你觉得你没有受到其他学生、讲师或大学工作人员的公平对待，你可能想要获得他们提供的平等机会服务。
content.en_text: If you feel that you are not being treated fairly by another student or lecturer or university staff member, you might like to access the Equal Opportunity Service offered by them.

content.cn_text: 他们还经营各种社交和体育俱乐部和活动项目，我鼓励你报名参加。
content.en_text: They also run various social and sporting clubs and activity programs which I'd encourage you to sign up for.

content.cn_text: 在谈话的最后一部分之前，请看问题17至问题20。
content.en_text: Before the final part of the talk, look at Questions 17 to 20.

content.cn_text: (短暂的停顿)
content.en_text: [SHORT PAUSE]

content.cn_text: 现在你将听到剩下的谈话。
content.en_text: Now you will hear the rest of the talk.

content.cn_text: 回答问题17至20。
content.en_text: Answer Questions 17 to 20.

content.cn_text: 显然，您需要知道这些服务在哪里。
content.en_text: Obviously, you'll need to know where these services are.

content.cn_text: 我们现在在大礼堂。
content.en_text: We're currently in the Grand Hall.

content.cn_text: 现在，如果你看一下校园地图——啊，图书馆服务当然在图书馆里，在我的右边——就在户外运动设施和霍金斯学生停车场之间。
content.en_text: Now if you have a look on your campus map - ah, the Library Services are of course in the library which is over to my right - just between the Outdoor Sporting Facilities and Hawkins Student Car Park.

content.cn_text: 学生会大楼也在同一个方向——但是它在停车场的前面。
content.en_text: The Student Union Building is also in that same direction - but it's in front of the Car Park.

content.cn_text: 对于那些要乘公共汽车旅行的人来说，大学的公共汽车站就在图书馆外面。
content.en_text: For those of you who'll be travelling by bus, the university bus-stop is just outside the library.

content.cn_text: 行政大楼在我的左边，在国际中心中间
content.en_text: The Administration Building is over to my left - between the International Centre

content.cn_text: 还有邮局。
content.en_text: and the Post Office.

content.cn_text: 你们大多数人已经来过我们这里了。
content.en_text: Most of you have been to visit us already.

content.cn_text: 虽然书店由行政人员管理，但它和邮局在同一栋楼里——就在学生食堂后面。
content.en_text: Even though the Administration Staff look after the Bookshop, it's in the same building as the Post Office -just behind the Student Refectory.

content.cn_text: 如果你来行政大楼，我们会告诉你它在哪里。
content.en_text: If you come to the Administration Building, we'll show you where it is anyway.

content.cn_text: 所有的学术人员都住在他们各自的教学楼里，你会很熟悉的。
content.en_text: All of the academic staff are found in their particular faculty buildings which you'll get to know very well.

content.cn_text: 职业生涯和国际学生顾问在国际中心后面的一座小楼里，在工程和艺术街区之间。在校园里找路真的很容易，大多数教职员工和学生都非常愿意给你指路。
content.en_text: The Career and International Student Advisors are in a small building behind the International Centre, in between the Engineering and the Arts Block.It's really quite easy to find your way around the campus and most staff and students are more than willing to give you directions.

content.cn_text: 现在我们要休息一下，在大厅后面喝点茶，吃点饼干。
content.en_text: Now we're just going to have a short break with some tea and biscuits at the back of the hall.

content.cn_text: 所以，如果你愿意站起来，下来……
content.en_text: So, if you'd like to stand up and come down ...

content.cn_text: 以上是第二部分的全部内容。
content.en_text: That is the end of Section 2.

content.cn_text: 现在你有半分钟的时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have 1/2 minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 现在翻到听力问题手册的第三部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to Section 3 of your Listening Question Booklet.

groups.desc:
Questions 11-16
Complete the table below.
Use NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

content: Central City University - Student Support Services

- counselling re: course selection 
- language support
Research & Resource Department Study Skills Department$17537$

- assistance and advice for research and library use 
- assistance with arranging$17536$arrange computer logon and password

Administration Officers$17538$
Homestay Officer Student Employment Officer$17539$
Bookshop
- issuing student cards - independent accommodation advice - family-style accommodation advice - part-time and vacation employment - inquiries re: passports and visas - retail outlet

Student Counselling Service
Equal Opportunity Services
Activity & Clubs Services

- counselling re:$17540$problems 
- petitioning and sexual harassment 
- availability of clubs and activity schedules

items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于准确识别针对特定学生群体的支持服务。文中明确提到"International Student Advisor"是专门帮助"non-English-speaking backgrounds"学生的，这与题目要求的"Academic Support Services"下的语言支持直接对应。虽然Academic Support Services部门也提供课程选择和评估标准解释等服务，但针对非英语背景学生的语言支持是由International Student Advisor提供的。因此，International Student Advisor是最符合题目要求的答案。在做这类题目时，要注意听辨特定职位名称，并将其与相应的职责联系起来。这里的关键是理解"non-English-speaking backgrounds"与国际学生的联系，以及"advisor"作为一个提供专门帮助的角色。

这道题的关键在于理解Study Skills Department的职能。文中明确指出，Study Skills Department积极推广小型学习和学习小组。这正是我们需要填入表格的信息。注意听力材料中使用了"promoting"这个动词，意味着这个部门不仅仅是提供这项服务，而是积极推广它。因此，"learning/study groups"是最合适的答案。这个答案直接反映了该部门的主要活动，也符合大学图书馆支持学生学习的功能。记住，在听力考试中，我们常常需要捕捉这种具体的服务或活动描述，而不是仅仅停留在部门名称上。

这道题的正确答案是"Student IT Department"，因为原文中明确指出了这个部门的职责。让我们来分析一下为什么这是正确答案：首先，题目要求填写的是Library Services下的一个部门名称。其次，我们需要找到与IT（信息技术）相关的部门。在原文中，我们可以看到"Student IT Department"这个部门被明确提到，而且它的职责是处理学生的电子邮件访问和电脑密码，这些都是典型的IT服务。虽然Research and Resource Department和Study Skills Department也被提到，但它们的职责并不涉及IT服务。因此，"Student IT Department"是最符合题目要求的答案。在做这类题目时，要注意听取各个部门的具体职责，并将其与题目要求相匹配，这样才能准确找到正确答案。

这道题的答案是"Housing Officer"或"Accommodation Officer"，因为题目要求填写管理学生服务中负责独立住宿的官员。原文中明确提到，如果学生想要搬进更独立的住宿，应该去见"Housing Officer"。这个职位直接对应了题目中所需的信息。

需要注意的是，虽然文中也提到了"Homestay Officer"，但这个职位主要负责家庭式寄宿，而不是题目要求的更独立的住宿方式。因此，"Housing Officer"或"Accommodation Officer"才是正确答案。

这个问题考察了学生对大学不同住宿服务的理解，以及识别特定职位名称的能力。成功回答这个问题需要学生能够准确理解"independent-style accommodation"的含义，并将其与相应的负责人联系起来。

这道题的关键在于理解行政楼里最重要的部门是哪一个。听力中明确提到"most importantly, our International Department"，这表明国际部门是行政楼中最重要的部门。而且，紧接着说明如果有护照或签证问题要来这里，这进一步证实了国际部门的重要性，因为护照和签证事务通常由国际部门处理。因此，"International Department"是正确答案。此外，在表格中，这个位置是在"Administration Student Services"下面，与护照和签证查询相关，这与听力内容完全吻合。所以，即使你没有听清楚全部内容，只要抓住了"most importantly"和"passports or visas"这两个关键点，也能推断出正确答案。

这道题的关键在于准确理解学生会提供的服务内容。文中明确提到学生会提供咨询服务，用于解决学生的"personal or financial problems"（个人或财务问题）。这正是题目所要求填写的内容。注意，虽然原文提到了"Student Counselling Service"（学生咨询服务），但题目要求填写的是学生会处理的问题类型，而不是具体的服务名称。因此，正确答案应该是"personal or financial"。在做这类题目时，要注意区分服务的名称和服务处理的内容，避免被具体的服务名称误导。同时，要善于利用"For example"这样的例证引导词，它往往会引出重要的细节信息。

groups.desc:
Questions 17-20
Match the names of the buildings with the letters A-E on the map below.

items.title: The Library
items.analysis: 因为听力原文中明确提到“the Library Services are of course in the library which is over to my right - just between the Outdoor Sporting Facilities and Hawkins Student Car Park”，而在地图上，B建筑位于户外运动设施（Pool & Gym）和Hawkins学生停车场之间，所以答案是B。其他选项如A和C的位置描述不符合原文中的位置描述，因此是错误的。

items.title: Administration Building
items.analysis: 根据听力原文，“The Administration Building is over to my left - between the International Centre and the Post Office.”，行政楼在国际中心和邮局之间。通过地图可以看到，D位置正好在International Centre（国际中心）和Post Office（邮局）之间，因此答案是D。这个题目中，定位词是“Administration Building”，信号词是“between the International Centre and the Post Office”，结合地图信息，可以准确找到答案为D。

items.title: Bookshop
items.analysis: 文中提到“书店与邮局在同一栋楼里——就在学生餐厅的后面”，而在地图上，E位置正好在Student Refectory的后面。因此，正确答案是E。其他选项不符合这个描述。例如，D虽然在Student Refectory附近，但不是在其后面；A位置与描述不符。

items.title: International Student Advisor
items.analysis: 因为原文中提到“The Career and International Student Advisors are in a small building behind the International Centre, in between the Engineering and the Arts Block.”，意思是职业和国际学生顾问在国际中心后面，位于工程楼和艺术楼之间。根据地图，这个位置对应的就是C选项。所以答案是C。
